Snacks.name: Samosa
steps: Knead flour with 4 tbsp oil and water into a stiff dough. Rest for 20 min.
Heat 1 tbsp oil, add cumin & fennel seeds, then mashed potatoes, peas, and spices. Cook for 5 min.
Roll dough into thin circles, cut in half, form cones, fill with potato mixture, seal edges.
Deep fry on medium heat until golden brown. Serve with chutney.

Snacks.name: Pakora
steps: Mix gram flour, spices, and salt. Add water gradually to make a thick batter.
Dip sliced vegetables into batter, coat well.
Drop small portions into hot oil. Fry until golden and crispy.
Drain on paper towel. Serve hot with ketchup or chutney.

Snacks.name: Dahi Bhalla
steps: Soak urad dal for 4 hours, then grind into a smooth paste.
Whisk the batter until fluffy. Drop spoonfuls into hot oil and fry until golden.
Soak fried bhallas in warm water for 15 min, then gently squeeze out water.
Arrange on a plate, pour whisked yogurt, drizzle chutneys, sprinkle cumin and chili powder. Serve chilled.

Snacks.name: Chicken Tikka
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic, chili powder, garam masala, lemon juice, salt for 2 hours.
Skewer chicken pieces. Grill or bake at 200°C for 15-20 min, basting with oil.
Serve hot with mint chutney and onion rings.

Snacks.name: Pani Puri
steps: Make a hole in each puri shell.
Fill with mashed potatoes and chickpeas.
Pour tamarind water and mint water into each puri.
Top with sweet chutney, sprinkle chaat masala and black salt. Serve immediately.

Snacks.name: Aloo Tikki
steps: Mix mashed potatoes, breadcrumbs, and all spices.
Shape into flat patties.
Heat oil in a pan, shallow fry patties until golden brown on both sides.
Serve with chutney and yogurt.

Snacks.name: Chicken Seekh Kabab
steps: Mix all ingredients except oil until well combined.
Shape mixture onto skewers into long sausages.
Grill or pan-fry with oil until cooked through and charred.
Serve with mint chutney and onion rings.

Snacks.name: Onion Bhaji
steps: Mix gram flour, spices, and salt. Add water to make thick batter.
Add sliced onions, coat well.
Drop spoonfuls into hot oil, fry until golden and crispy.
Serve with tamarind chutney.

Main Courses.name: Chicken Biryani
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, and salt for 30 min.
Fry sliced onions until golden brown; set aside.
In the same oil, add marinated chicken and cook until half done.
Parboil rice with whole spices (bay leaf, cardamom, cloves) until 70% cooked. Drain.
Layer rice over chicken, sprinkle fried onions, herbs, saffron milk, and biryani masala.
Cover and cook on low heat (dum) for 20 min. Serve hot with raita.

Main Courses.name: Nihari
ingredients: Fresh ginger slices & green chilies for garnish
steps: Heat oil, add ginger-garlic paste and nihari masala, fry for 1 min.
Add beef and sear until brown. Add 6 cups water and salt. Pressure cook for 45 min (or simmer 3 hours).
Mix roasted flour with 1 cup water to make a slurry. Add to the curry and cook until thickened.
Finish with lemon juice. Garnish with ginger slices and green chilies. Serve with naan.

Main Courses.name: Daal Makhani
ingredients: 1 cup whole black urad dal (soaked overnight)
steps: Pressure cook dal and rajma with 4 cups water until soft (about 6 whistles). Mash lightly.
Heat butter and oil, add cumin seeds and ginger-garlic paste. Saute.
Add tomato puree, chili powder, and cook until oil separates.
Add cooked dal, salt, and simmer for 20 min, stirring often.
Stir in cream and simmer another 5 min. Serve with rice or naan.

Main Courses.name: Mutton Karahi
steps: Heat oil, add mutton and ginger-garlic paste. Fry until mutton changes color.
Add chopped tomatoes, cover and cook until tomatoes soften and oil separates.
Add chili powder, coriander powder, salt, and yogurt. Cook until mutton is tender (about 20 min).
Sprinkle black pepper and green chilies. Garnish with coriander. Serve with naan.

Main Courses.name: Palak Paneer
steps: Heat butter, add cumin seeds, onion, and ginger-garlic paste. Saute until golden.
Add tomato puree, cook until oil separates. Add spinach puree, chili powder, garam masala, salt. Cook 5 min.
Add paneer cubes and cream. Simmer 5 more minutes. Serve with roti or naan.

Main Courses.name: Butter Chicken
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt, chili powder, and salt for 30 min. Grill or pan-fry until cooked.
Heat butter, add ginger-garlic paste, tomato puree, cashew paste. Cook until oil separates.
Add red chili powder, garam masala, and salt. Simmer for 10 min.
Add cream and grilled chicken. Simmer 5 min. Add crushed kasuri methi. Serve with naan.

Main Courses.name: Chole Bhature
steps: Pressure cook chickpeas until soft.
Heat oil, add cumin seeds, onions, ginger-garlic paste. Saute until golden.
Add tomato puree and chole masala, cook until oil separates.
Add cooked chickpeas and water. Simmer for 15 min.
For bhature: Knead flour, yogurt, and salt into soft dough. Rest 1 hour. Roll and deep fry.

Main Courses.name: Fish Curry
steps: Marinate fish with turmeric and salt. Shallow fry until golden. Set aside.
Heat oil, add cumin seeds, onion, ginger-garlic paste. Saute until brown.
Add tomato puree, chili powder, cook until oil separates.
Add coconut milk and 1/2 cup water. Simmer for 5 min.
Add fried fish, cook for 5 min. Garnish with coriander. Serve with rice.

Desserts.name: Gulab Jamun
steps: Mix milk powder, flour, and ghee. Add milk gradually to form a soft dough. Rest 10 min.
Make small smooth balls (no cracks).
Prepare sugar syrup: boil sugar, water, and cardamom until slightly sticky. Keep warm.
Deep fry balls on low heat until golden brown. Drain and immediately drop into warm syrup.
Let soak for at least 1 hour. Serve warm or room temperature.

Desserts.name: Kheer
steps: Drain rice and grind coarsely.
Heat ghee in a heavy pan, add rice and fry for 2 min.
Add milk and bring to a boil, then simmer on low heat, stirring often, until rice is soft and milk thickens (about 40 min).
Add sugar, cardamom, saffron, and half the nuts. Cook 5 more minutes.
Serve chilled or warm, garnished with remaining nuts.

Desserts.name: Jalebi
steps: Mix flour, cornflour, yogurt, and 1/2 cup water into a smooth batter. Ferment for 6-8 hours.
Add baking soda just before frying. Mix well.
Make sugar syrup: boil sugar, water, saffron, cardamom until one-string consistency.
Fill batter in a piping bag with small nozzle. Pipe spirals into hot ghee, fry until crisp and golden.
Dip in warm syrup for 30 seconds. Serve hot.

Desserts.name: Ras Malai
steps: Boil milk, add lemon juice to curdle. Strain and hang paneer for 2 hours.
Knead paneer until smooth, form small flat balls.
Boil sugar and water, add paneer balls, cook for 10 min. Remove and cool.
Simmer evaporated milk, condensed milk, and cardamom until thickened. Cool.
Soak paneer balls in thickened milk. Refrigerate for 4 hours. Garnish with nuts.

Desserts.name: Gajar Ka Halwa
steps: Heat ghee, add grated carrots. Saute for 5-7 min until softened.
Add milk, cook on low heat, stirring often, until milk is fully absorbed (30-40 min).
Add sugar, khoya, raisins, and half the nuts. Cook until sugar dissolves and mixture thickens.
Add cardamom powder. Garnish with remaining nuts. Serve warm.

Drinks.name: Mango Lassi
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth and frothy.
Pour into glasses, garnish with a mango slice or mint leaf. Serve immediately.

Drinks.name: Masala Chai
steps: Bring water, spices, and ginger to a boil. Simmer for 2 min.
Add tea leaves and sugar, boil for 2 min.
Add milk, bring to a rolling boil. Strain into cups. Serve hot.

Drinks.name: Rooh Afza Milkshake
steps: Blend milk, Rooh Afza, and ice cream until frothy.
Fill glass with ice cubes and soaked sabja seeds.
Pour milkshake, garnish with a mint leaf. Serve cold.

Drinks.name: Nimbu Pani (Indian Lemonade)
steps: In a pitcher, mix lemon juice, sugar, black salt, and cumin powder.
Add water and stir until sugar dissolves.
Add ice cubes, garnish with mint. Serve chilled.

Drinks.name: Thandai
ingredients: 2 tbsp thandai masala (fennel seeds, cardamom, peppercorns, almonds, melon seeds)
steps: Grind all thandai masala ingredients into a fine powder.
Blend milk, sugar, thandai powder, and saffron until smooth.
Pour over ice cubes, garnish with pistachios. Serve chilled.

Snacks.name: Bruschetta
steps: Toast baguette slices until golden and crisp.
Mix tomatoes, garlic, basil, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Spoon tomato mixture onto toast slices. Serve immediately.

Snacks.name: French Fries
ingredients: Oil for deep frying (peanut or vegetable oil)
Optional: paprika, garlic powder, or vinegar
steps: Cut potatoes into even sticks (1/4 inch thick). Soak in cold water for 30 min to remove starch.
Drain and pat completely dry.
First fry at 325°F (165°C) for 5-6 min until soft but not brown. Drain and cool.
Second fry at 375°F (190°C) until golden and crispy (2-3 min).
Drain on paper towel, season immediately with salt. Serve with ketchup.

Snacks.name: Garlic Bread
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Mix butter, garlic, and parsley in a bowl.
Spread butter mixture generously on cut sides of baguette.
Place on baking sheet, sprinkle with Parmesan if desired.
Bake for 8-10 min until edges are crisp and golden. Slice and serve warm.

Snacks.name: Mozzarella Sticks
steps: Freeze mozzarella sticks for 30 min.
Mix breadcrumbs, garlic powder, and oregano.
Dredge each stick in flour, then egg, then breadcrumbs. Repeat for double coating.
Deep fry at 350°F (175°C) for 1-2 min until golden. Serve with marinara sauce.

Snacks.name: Onion Rings
steps: Soak onion rings in buttermilk for 30 min.
Mix flour, breadcrumbs, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Dredge rings in flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Deep fry at 375°F (190°C) until golden brown. Drain on paper towel. Serve hot.

Snacks.name: Chicken Wings (Buffalo)
ingredients: Celery sticks & blue cheese dressing for serving
steps: Season wings with salt, garlic powder, paprika.
Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 min or deep fry until crispy.
Mix hot sauce and melted butter. Toss wings in sauce.
Serve with celery sticks and blue cheese dressing.

Snacks.name: Nachos with Cheese Sauce
ingredients: Jalapenos, salsa, sour cream for topping
steps: Arrange tortilla chips on a baking sheet.
Make cheese sauce: melt butter, add flour, whisk in milk, then add cheese until smooth.
Pour cheese sauce over chips. Top with jalapenos.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 5 min. Serve with salsa and sour cream.

Snacks.name: Pigs in a Blanket
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cut crescent dough into small triangles. Wrap each sausage in dough.
Place on baking sheet, brush with egg wash, sprinkle sesame seeds.
Bake for 12-15 min until golden. Serve with mustard or ketchup.

Main Courses.name: Alfredo Pasta
steps: Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente. Drain, reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté 1 min.
Add cream and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat, whisk in Parmesan until smooth.
Toss in cooked pasta, add pasta water if needed for consistency. Season with salt and white pepper.
Garnish with parsley. Serve immediately.

Main Courses.name: Grilled Steak
ingredients: 2 beef steaks (ribeye or sirloin, 1 inch thick)
steps: Pat steaks dry, season generously with salt and pepper. Let sit at room temp for 30 min.
Heat a cast iron skillet over high heat until smoking. Add oil.
Sear steaks for 2-3 min per side for medium-rare.
Reduce heat to medium, add butter, garlic, rosemary, and thyme. Tilt pan and baste steaks with butter for 1 min.
Rest steaks on a cutting board for 5 min before serving. Slice against the grain.

Main Courses.name: Chicken Parmesan
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Season chicken with salt and pepper. Dredge in flour, then egg, then breadcrumbs mixed with Parmesan.
Heat oil in skillet, fry chicken until golden brown (2-3 min per side).
Place chicken in baking dish, top each with marinara sauce and mozzarella.
Bake for 15 min until cheese is bubbly and chicken is cooked through. Serve with pasta or salad.

Main Courses.name: Beef Lasagna
steps: Cook lasagna noodles according to package. Drain and set aside.
Heat oil, sauté onion and garlic. Add beef, cook until browned. Stir in marinara sauce, simmer 10 min.
Mix ricotta, egg, half the mozzarella, Parmesan, salt, and pepper.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). In a baking dish, layer: meat sauce, noodles, ricotta mixture. Repeat.
Top with remaining mozzarella. Cover with foil, bake 25 min. Uncover, bake 15 min more. Let rest 10 min before serving.

Main Courses.name: Fish and Chips
ingredients: 1 cup cold beer or sparkling water
steps: Cut potatoes into thick fries. Double fry as per French fries recipe.
Mix flour, baking powder, salt, pepper. Whisk in cold beer until smooth batter forms.
Pat fish dry, dip in batter, let excess drip off.
Deep fry at 375°F (190°C) for 5-6 min until golden and crispy.
Serve with tartar sauce and lemon wedges.

Main Courses.name: Shepherd's Pie
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Brown meat in a skillet. Add onion, carrots, cook until soft.
Add tomato paste, broth, peas. Simmer until thickened.
Transfer to baking dish, top with mashed potatoes.
Dot with butter, bake for 20-25 min until bubbly and golden.

Main Courses.name: Margherita Pizza
steps: Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C) with pizza stone if available.
Roll out dough, spread tomato sauce evenly.
Top with mozzarella slices and fresh basil.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle salt.
Bake for 10-12 min until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.

Main Courses.name: Beef Burger
steps: Form ground beef into 4 patties, season both sides with salt and pepper.
Grill or pan-fry patties for 3-4 min per side for medium. Add cheese in last minute.
Toast buns lightly. Spread sauce on bottom bun.
Layer lettuce, patty, tomato, onion, top bun. Serve with fries.

Desserts.name: Apple Pie
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
In a bowl, mix apple slices, sugar, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and lemon juice.
Line a pie dish with one crust. Fill with apple mixture, dot with butter.
Cover with second crust, crimp edges, cut slits on top. Brush with egg wash.
Bake for 15 min, then reduce heat to 350°F (175°C) and bake 35-40 min until golden. Cool before slicing.

Desserts.name: Brownies
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 8x8 inch pan.
Melt butter, then stir in sugar, eggs, and vanilla.
Beat in cocoa, flour, salt, and baking powder until combined.
Spread batter in pan. Bake for 20-25 min (toothpick should come out with moist crumbs).
Cool completely before cutting. Serve fudgy brownies.

Desserts.name: Tiramisu
steps: Whisk egg yolks and sugar until pale. Add mascarpone, mix until smooth.
Beat egg whites to stiff peaks, fold into mascarpone mixture.
Dip ladyfingers in espresso briefly, layer in a dish. Spread half the mascarpone mixture.
Repeat layer. Dust with cocoa powder. Refrigerate 4 hours before serving.

Desserts.name: Creme Brulee
steps: Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C). Heat cream until just simmering.
Whisk egg yolks, sugar, and vanilla. Slowly pour hot cream into egg mixture, whisking constantly.
Strain mixture into ramekins. Place ramekins in a water bath. Bake 35-40 min until set.
Cool, refrigerate 2 hours. Sprinkle brown sugar on top, caramelize with torch until crispy.

Desserts.name: Cheesecake
steps: Mix crumbs, butter, 2 tbsp sugar. Press into springform pan. Chill 30 min.
Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, then vanilla and sour cream.
Pour over crust. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 45 min. Turn off oven, leave door slightly open for 1 hour.
Cool completely, refrigerate 4 hours before serving.

Drinks.name: Iced Latte
steps: Fill a tall glass with ice cubes.
Pour espresso and sugar over ice, stir to dissolve.
Top with cold milk, stir gently. Serve with a straw.

Drinks.name: Virgin Mojito
ingredients: Lime slice & mint sprig for garnish
steps: In a glass, muddle lime wedges, mint leaves, and sugar until mint releases aroma.
Fill glass with ice cubes, pour club soda over.
Stir gently, garnish with lime slice and mint sprig. Serve immediately.

Drinks.name: Strawberry Smoothie
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth and creamy.
Pour into a tall glass. Serve chilled with a straw.

Drinks.name: Hot Chocolate
steps: Heat milk in a saucepan until warm (not boiling).
Whisk in cocoa powder, sugar, and chocolate chips until melted and smooth.
Add vanilla, stir. Pour into mugs, top with whipped cream.

Drinks.name: Lemonade
ingredients: Lemon slices & mint leaves for garnish
steps: In a pitcher, mix lemon juice, sugar, and 1 cup warm water until sugar dissolves.
Add remaining 2 cups cold water and stir.
Add ice cubes, garnish with lemon slices and mint. Serve chilled.

Snacks.name: Spring Rolls
steps: In a pan, stir-fry cabbage, carrot, and sprouts with soy sauce, sesame oil, and pepper until slightly wilted (2 min).
Let filling cool. Place wrapper with a corner pointing toward you, place 2 tbsp filling near the bottom, fold sides, roll tightly, seal with water.
Heat oil to 350°F (175°C). Fry spring rolls until golden brown (3-4 min). Drain on paper towel. Serve with sweet chili sauce.

Snacks.name: Gyoza
steps: Mix pork, cabbage, green onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger, garlic.
Place 1 tsp filling in center of wrapper, wet edges, fold and pleat to seal.
Heat oil in non-stick pan, arrange gyoza flat side down. Fry until bottoms are golden (2-3 min).
Add water, cover, and steam for 5 min until wrappers are translucent.
Remove lid, let moisture evaporate. Serve with dipping sauce (soy sauce+vinegar).

Snacks.name: Edamame
steps: Boil edamame in salted water for 4-5 min.
Drain, toss with sesame oil and additional sea salt.
Serve warm as a snack.

Snacks.name: Onigiri (Rice Balls)
steps: Wet hands with water and salt. Take a handful of rice.
Make a dent, fill with tuna or plum, close rice around filling.
Shape into triangle or ball. Wrap with nori strip.
Serve at room temperature.

Snacks.name: Takoyaki
ingredients: Takoyaki sauce, mayo, bonito flakes, nori
steps: Mix batter, eggs, and water.
Heat takoyaki pan, grease holes, pour batter until full.
Add octopus, onion, ginger into each hole.
Flip balls as they cook until golden and crispy.
Top with sauce, mayo, bonito flakes, nori.

Snacks.name: Tempura Shrimp
steps: Make small cuts on shrimp belly to prevent curling.
Mix flour, ice water, and egg yolk lightly (lumpy batter is okay).
Dip shrimp in batter, deep fry at 350°F (175°C) for 2-3 min until crispy.
Drain on paper towel. Serve with tentsuyu sauce.

Snacks.name: Scallion Pancakes
steps: Mix flour and hot water, knead into dough. Rest 30 min.
Roll out dough thin, brush with sesame oil, sprinkle scallions and salt.
Roll up like a log, then coil into a spiral. Flatten again.
Pan-fry until golden and crispy on both sides. Cut into wedges.

Snacks.name: Chinese Dumplings (Jiaozi)
steps: Mix pork, cabbage, onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger.
Place 1 tsp filling in wrapper center, wet edges, fold and pleat to seal.
Boil for 5-6 min until floating, or pan-fry then steam.
Serve with black vinegar and chili oil.

Main Courses.name: Kung Pao Chicken
steps: Marinate chicken with 1 tbsp soy sauce and 1 tbsp cornstarch. Set aside.
Mix remaining soy sauces, hoisin, vinegar, sugar, and 1/2 cup water.
Heat oil, add chilies and garlic. Add chicken, stir-fry until golden (3-4 min).
Add bell pepper and sauce. Cook until thickened. Stir in peanuts. Serve with rice.

Main Courses.name: Chicken Ramen
steps: Simmer chicken thighs in broth with soy sauce and mirin for 20 min. Remove chicken, shred, set aside.
Cook ramen noodles according to package, drain.
Season broth with sesame oil. Divide noodles into bowls, pour broth, top with shredded chicken, egg halves, green onions, and nori. Serve hot.

Main Courses.name: Mapo Tofu
ingredients: 1 tbsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water
steps: Blanch tofu in salted water for 2 min, drain.
Heat oil, stir-fry pork until crispy. Add garlic, ginger, doubanjiang, cook 1 min.
Add 1/2 cup water, soy sauce, sugar, and tofu. Simmer gently for 5 min.
Stir in cornstarch slurry to thicken. Sprinkle Sichuan pepper and green onions. Serve with rice.

Main Courses.name: Sushi Rolls (Maki)
ingredients: Soy sauce, wasabi, pickled ginger for serving
steps: Rinse rice until water runs clear. Cook with water. Mix vinegar, sugar, salt; fold into cooked rice. Cool.
Place nori on bamboo mat, spread rice thinly, leaving 1 cm at top edge.
Arrange fillings in a line near bottom, roll tightly using mat. Moisten top edge to seal.
Slice roll into 8 pieces with wet knife. Serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and ginger.

Main Courses.name: Sweet and Sour Pork
steps: Coat pork cubes in cornstarch. Deep fry until golden and crispy.
In a pan, mix ketchup, vinegar, sugar, 1/2 cup water. Simmer until thickened.
Add bell pepper, pineapple, and fried pork. Toss to coat.
Serve immediately with steamed rice.

Main Courses.name: Beef and Broccoli
steps: Marinate beef with 1 tbsp soy sauce and 1 tbsp cornstarch.
Blanch broccoli in boiling water for 2 min, drain.
Heat oil, stir-fry garlic and beef until browned.
Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and 1/2 cup water.
Add broccoli, cook for 2 min. Serve with rice.

Main Courses.name: Fried Rice (Yangzhou)
steps: Heat oil in wok, add rice and break up clumps.
Add shrimp, ham, peas, carrots. Stir-fry for 3 min.
Add soy sauce and scrambled eggs. Toss well.
Garnish with green onions. Serve hot.

Main Courses.name: Japanese Curry
steps: Sauté meat and onion until browned. Add carrots and potatoes.
Add water, bring to boil, simmer for 15 min until vegetables are soft.
Add curry roux blocks, stir until melted and thickened.
Serve over steamed rice.

Desserts.name: Mochi
steps: Mix rice flour, sugar, and water in a microwave-safe bowl until smooth.
Cover with plastic wrap, microwave for 1 min. Stir, microwave another 1 min until translucent and sticky.
Dust work surface with cornstarch, transfer mochi dough, dust top. Flatten, cut into 8 pieces.
Flatten each piece, place 1 tsp red bean paste in center, seal edges into a ball. Dust off excess cornstarch. Serve.

Desserts.name: Matcha Cheesecake
steps: Preheat oven to 320°F (160°C).
Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time.
Add heavy cream, matcha powder, cornstarch, vanilla. Mix until combined.
Pour into greased pan. Bake in water bath for 35-40 min until set.
Cool, refrigerate 3 hours before serving.

Desserts.name: Dorayaki
steps: Mix eggs, sugar, honey until pale. Sift in flour and baking soda, add water, mix well. Rest 15 min.
Heat non-stick pan, pour small batter circles. Cook until bubbles appear, flip, cook 30 sec.
Sandwich red bean paste between two pancakes. Serve warm.

Desserts.name: Bingsu (Korean Shaved Ice)
steps: Shave ice in a blender or ice shaver until fluffy like snow.
Place shaved ice in a bowl, drizzle condensed milk.
Top with red beans, mochi, fruit, and matcha powder. Serve immediately.

Desserts.name: Tangyuan (Glutinous Rice Balls)
ingredients: 1/2 cup black sesame paste (or peanut paste)
steps: Mix rice flour and warm water to form a dough.
Divide into small balls, flatten, place filling in center, seal and roll into balls.
Boil water with sugar and ginger. Drop tangyuan in, cook until they float (3-4 min).
Serve in warm ginger syrup.

Drinks.name: Bubble Milk Tea
steps: Cook tapioca pearls according to package (boil 5 min, simmer 5 min, rest 5 min). Drain, rinse, toss with brown sugar syrup.
Steep tea bags in hot water for 5 min. Remove bags, let tea cool.
In a glass, add tapioca pearls, then ice, then tea, then milk. Stir well. Serve with a wide straw.

Drinks.name: Matcha Latte
steps: Whisk matcha powder and hot water until no lumps.
Heat or froth milk with sugar.
Pour matcha into milk, stir gently. For iced version, add ice cubes before pouring milk.

Drinks.name: Yuzu Honey Tea
steps: In a cup, mix yuzu marmalade and honey.
Pour hot water, stir well.
Garnish with lemon slice. Serve warm.

Drinks.name: Sikhye (Korean Sweet Rice Punch)
steps: Soak malt barley in water for 2 hours, strain liquid.
Mix malt liquid with cooked rice, keep warm at 140°F (60°C) for 4 hours.
Strain liquid, add sugar, bring to a boil, cool.
Serve chilled with pine nuts and a few grains of rice.

Drinks.name: Calpico Soda
steps: Fill glass with ice cubes.
Pour Calpico concentrate, then club soda.
Stir gently, garnish with lemon slice. Serve immediately.

Snacks.name: Chicken Satay
steps: Mix soy sauce, sugar, turmeric, garlic, coriander, and coconut milk. Marinate chicken for 2 hours.
Thread chicken onto bamboo skewers.
Grill over medium heat for 3-4 min per side until cooked and slightly charred.
Serve hot with peanut sauce.

Snacks.name: Thai Fish Cakes
steps: In a food processor, blend fish, curry paste, egg, fish sauce, sugar until smooth.
Transfer to a bowl, fold in lime leaves and green beans.
Shape into small patties. Fry in hot oil until golden brown (2-3 min per side).
Serve with sweet chili sauce and cucumber relish.

Snacks.name: Prawn Crackers (Krupuk)
steps: Heat oil to 375°F (190°C).
Drop in a few raw crackers at a time—they expand instantly.
Remove within 2-3 seconds, drain on paper towel.
Serve as a crunchy snack or side.

Snacks.name: Lumpia (Filipino Spring Rolls)
steps: Sauté pork until browned. Add vegetables and soy sauce, cook until wilted. Cool.
Place 1 tbsp filling on wrapper, fold sides, roll tightly, seal with water.
Deep fry until golden brown and crispy.
Serve with sweet chili sauce or vinegar dip.

Snacks.name: Thai Spring Rolls (Fresh)
steps: Dip rice paper in warm water for 10 seconds until soft.
Lay flat, arrange shrimp, vermicelli, herbs, and vegetables in center.
Fold sides over filling and roll tightly.
Serve with peanut dipping sauce.

Snacks.name: Otak Otak (Grilled Fish Paste)
steps: Mix fish paste, coconut milk, curry paste, eggs, fish sauce, sugar, lime leaves.
Place spoonfuls on banana leaves, fold into parcels.
Grill or steam for 15 min.
Serve warm with rice.

Snacks.name: Som Tam (Green Papaya Salad)
steps: In a mortar, pound garlic and chilies.
Add fish sauce, lime juice, palm sugar. Mix well.
Add papaya, tomatoes, dried shrimp. Toss to combine.
Top with crushed peanuts. Serve as a snack or side.

Snacks.name: Vietnamese Summer Rolls (Gỏi Cuốn)
steps: Dip rice paper in warm water briefly.
Layer lettuce, vermicelli, herbs, protein, cucumber.
Fold sides and roll tightly.
Serve with peanut hoisin dipping sauce.

Main Courses.name: Pad Thai
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 20 min, drain.
Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and palm sugar to make sauce.
Heat oil, sauté garlic, add shrimp and cook until pink. Push to side.
Add eggs, scramble, then add noodles and sauce. Toss well.
Add bean sprouts and green onions. Serve topped with peanuts and lime wedges.

Main Courses.name: Nasi Goreng
steps: Heat oil, fry eggs sunny-side up, set aside.
In same pan, sauté garlic, shallots, chili until fragrant. Add chicken, cook until done.
Add rice, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, shrimp paste. Stir-fry until well combined.
Garnish with green onions and fried egg. Serve with prawn crackers.

Main Courses.name: Beef Rendang
ingredients: Spice paste: 10 shallots, 5 garlic cloves, 5 red chilies, 2 inches ginger, 2 inches galangal, 1 tsp turmeric powder
steps: Blend spice paste ingredients until smooth.
In a heavy pot, toast spice paste until fragrant. Add beef and cook until browned.
Add coconut milk, lime leaves, lemongrass, and salt. Bring to a boil, then simmer on low heat.
Cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, until coconut milk evaporates and beef is very tender (about 2 hours).
The rendang should be dark brown and dry. Serve with rice.

Main Courses.name: Tom Yum Soup
ingredients: 2 lemongrass stalks (cut into 2-inch pieces and smashed)
steps: Bring broth to a boil. Add lemongrass, lime leaves, and chilies. Simmer for 5 min.
Add mushrooms and shrimp, cook until shrimp is pink (2-3 min).
Season with fish sauce, lime juice, and sugar. Adjust to taste.
Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot.

Main Courses.name: Green Curry Chicken
steps: Heat coconut milk until it separates oil. Add green curry paste, fry until fragrant.
Add chicken, cook until white. Add remaining coconut milk and 1/2 cup water.
Add eggplants, bamboo shoots, lime leaves. Simmer for 10 min.
Season with fish sauce and palm sugar. Stir in basil leaves just before serving.
Serve with jasmine rice.

Main Courses.name: Hainanese Chicken Rice
steps: Poach whole chicken in water with ginger and pandan until cooked (30-40 min). Shock in ice bath.
Toast rice in oil with garlic, shallots, ginger. Add chicken broth, cook until fluffy.
Chop chicken into pieces, drizzle with sesame oil and soy sauce.
Serve with rice, cucumber, and chili-ginger dipping sauce.

Main Courses.name: Pineapple Fried Rice
steps: Heat oil, add protein and cook until done.
Add rice, curry powder, fish sauce. Stir-fry for 2 min.
Add pineapple, cashews, raisins, scrambled eggs.
Garnish with green onions. Serve in hollowed pineapple half if desired.

Main Courses.name: Laksa (Spicy Noodle Soup)
steps: Sauté laksa paste until fragrant. Add chicken broth, bring to boil.
Add coconut milk, shrimp, fish cakes. Simmer for 5 min.
Cook noodles according to package, place in bowls.
Pour broth over noodles, top with bean sprouts, egg, herbs. Serve hot.

Desserts.name: Mango Sticky Rice
steps: Soak sticky rice for 4 hours, then steam for 20 min.
Heat coconut milk, sugar, and salt until sugar dissolves. Reserve some for topping.
Pour the coconut mixture over the cooked rice, let sit for 15 min to absorb.
Serve rice alongside mango slices, drizzle with reserved coconut milk, sprinkle sesame seeds.

Desserts.name: Thai Roti with Condensed Milk
steps: Mix flour, salt, sugar. Add warm water and melted butter, knead into soft dough. Rest 30 min.
Divide dough into balls, flatten into thin circles.
Heat oil in pan, fry roti until golden and crispy on both sides.
Drizzle condensed milk, sprinkle sugar. Serve hot.

Desserts.name: Cendol
steps: Mix rice flour, pandan juice, and water. Cook until thick and gelatinous.
Press through a sieve or cendol maker into iced water to form green droplets.
In a bowl, add cendol droplets, coconut milk, palm sugar syrup, and ice cubes.
Top with red beans if desired. Serve cold.

Desserts.name: Khao Niao Sangkhaya (Sticky Rice with Custard)
steps: Press cooked sticky rice into a bowl, invert onto plate.
Whisk eggs, coconut milk, palm sugar, salt. Steam in a bowl until custard sets (15 min).
Pour coconut cream over custard, steam 5 more min.
Serve custard alongside sticky rice.

Desserts.name: Banh Flan (Vietnamese Caramel Flan)
steps: Melt 1/2 cup sugar in a pan until golden brown. Pour into ramekins to coat bottom.
Blend eggs, condensed milk, warm water, and vanilla.
Strain mixture into ramekins over caramel. Cover with foil.
Steam for 25-30 min until set. Cool, refrigerate 2 hours. Invert to serve.

Drinks.name: Thai Iced Tea
steps: Steep Thai tea mix in hot water for 5 min. Strain into a pitcher.
Stir in sugar until dissolved. Let cool.
Fill glasses with ice, pour tea, top with evaporated milk. Stir and serve.

Drinks.name: Bandung (Rose Milk)
steps: In a pitcher, mix rose syrup, evaporated milk, and water.
Fill glasses with ice cubes, pour bandung. Serve immediately.

Drinks.name: Es Campur (Indonesian Mixed Ice)
steps: In a glass, add all fruit, jelly, and palm seeds.
Top with shaved ice, drizzle rose syrup and condensed milk.
Serve immediately with a spoon and straw.

Drinks.name: Soursop Juice
steps: Blend soursop pulp, condensed milk, and water until smooth.
Strain if desired. Pour over ice cubes. Serve cold.

Drinks.name: Pandan Iced Tea
steps: Boil pandan leaves in water for 5 min. Add tea bags, steep 3 min.
Remove tea bags and pandan. Stir in sugar, let cool.
Pour over ice cubes. Serve chilled.

Snacks.name: Falafel
steps: Drain chickpeas. In food processor, combine chickpeas, herbs, onion, garlic, spices, and salt. Pulse until coarse meal (not puree).
Stir in baking powder. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
Form into small balls or patties.
Deep fry at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown (3-4 min). Serve with tahini sauce.

Snacks.name: Hummus
steps: Blend chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, and salt in a food processor.
Add olive oil and blend. Gradually add water until smooth and creamy.
Serve drizzled with olive oil and sprinkled with paprika.

Snacks.name: Baba Ghanoush
steps: Roast eggplants over open flame or in oven until skin is charred and flesh is soft.
Peel off skin, drain excess liquid.
Blend eggplant flesh with tahini, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, salt.
Drizzle with olive oil. Serve with pita bread.

Snacks.name: Zatar Manakish
steps: Mix flour, yeast, salt. Add water and 2 tbsp oil, knead into dough. Rest 1 hour.
Divide dough into balls, roll out into flat circles.
Mix zatar with 1/4 cup olive oil, spread on dough.
Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 8-10 min until edges are crisp.

Snacks.name: Kibbeh
steps: Soak bulgur in water for 30 min, squeeze dry.
Mix bulgur with half the meat, onion, spices to make outer shell.
Sauté remaining meat with more onions and spices for filling.
Form bulgur mixture into balls, stuff with filling, seal.
Deep fry until golden brown. Serve with yogurt sauce.

Snacks.name: Sambusak (Meat Pies)
steps: Mix flour, yogurt, oil, baking powder, salt into dough. Rest 30 min.
Sauté meat and onion with spices until cooked. Cool.
Roll dough thin, cut into circles. Place filling in center, fold into half-moons, seal edges with fork.
Brush with egg wash, bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 min until golden.

Snacks.name: Labneh Balls
steps: Roll labneh into small balls.
Place in a jar, cover with olive oil.
Add herbs and spices. Refrigerate for 24 hours.
Serve with pita bread as a dip.

Snacks.name: Muhammara
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth but slightly chunky.
Adjust seasoning. Drizzle with olive oil before serving.
Serve with pita or vegetable sticks.

Main Courses.name: Lamb Kabab
steps: Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
Form into long sausages around skewers.
Grill over medium-high heat for 10-12 min, turning occasionally, until charred and cooked through.
Serve with flatbread and yogurt sauce.

Main Courses.name: Shakshuka
steps: Heat oil in a skillet, sauté onion and bell pepper until soft (5 min).
Add garlic, paprika, cumin, cayenne, cook 1 min. Add tomatoes, salt, pepper. Simmer 10 min.
Make 4 wells in sauce, crack an egg into each. Cover and cook until eggs are set (5-7 min).
Garnish with parsley. Serve with bread.

Main Courses.name: Chicken Shawarma
ingredients: Pita bread, tahini sauce, tomatoes, cucumbers for serving
steps: Mix yogurt, lemon juice, oil, garlic, and spices. Marinate chicken for 2 hours.
Pan-sear or grill chicken until cooked and charred. Slice thinly.
Warm pita, fill with chicken, tahini, and fresh veggies. Serve.

Main Courses.name: Kebab Koobideh
steps: Mix all ingredients well. Knead for 5 min until paste-like.
Form around flat skewers into long sausages.
Grill over hot coals for 5-7 min per side.
Serve with saffron rice and grilled tomatoes.

Main Courses.name: Dolma (Stuffed Grape Leaves)
steps: Sauté onion and pine nuts. Add rice, currants, herbs, lamb if using. Season.
Place 1 tbsp filling on a grape leaf, fold sides, roll tightly.
Layer dolmas in a pot, place lemon slices on top, add water and olive oil to cover.
Simmer covered for 45 min. Serve warm or at room temperature.

Main Courses.name: Tabbouleh Salad
steps: Soak bulgur in water for 20 min, squeeze dry.
Mix bulgur, parsley, mint, tomatoes, cucumber.
Dress with lemon juice, olive oil, salt.
Serve as a side dish with pita.

Main Courses.name: Fatteh
steps: Mix yogurt, tahini, garlic, and salt.
Layer toasted pita pieces in a dish, top with warm chickpeas.
Pour yogurt sauce over, sprinkle pine nuts, paprika, parsley.
Serve immediately.

Main Courses.name: Mansaf (Jordanian Lamb with Rice)
steps: Simmer lamb in water until tender (1.5 hours). Remove lamb, reserve broth.
Dissolve jameed in warm broth, simmer until thick.
Cook rice in salted water. Toast nuts.
Layer pita on a platter, then rice, then lamb, then yogurt sauce.
Top with nuts. Serve traditionally with hands.

Desserts.name: Baklava
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Butter a baking dish.
Mix walnuts and cinnamon. Layer 10 sheets of phyllo, brushing each with butter. Sprinkle nut mixture.
Repeat layers, ending with 10 sheets of phyllo on top. Cut into diamonds.
Bake for 45 min until golden. Meanwhile, boil sugar, water, honey, vanilla for 10 min.
Pour syrup over hot baklava. Let cool completely before serving.

Desserts.name: Kunafa
steps: Shred kunafa dough, mix with melted butter.
Press half the dough into a greased pan. Layer with mozzarella and ricotta.
Top with remaining dough, press firmly. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 min until golden.
Boil sugar, water, rose water for 10 min to make syrup.
Pour syrup over hot kunafa. Garnish with pistachios. Serve warm.

Desserts.name: Basbousa (Semolina Cake)
ingredients: For syrup: 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup water, 1 tbsp lemon juice
steps: Mix semolina, sugar, baking powder, coconut. Add yogurt, butter, eggs. Mix well.
Pour into greased pan, bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-30 min until golden.
Boil syrup ingredients for 10 min. Pour over hot basbousa.
Let absorb syrup for 2 hours. Cut into diamonds.

Desserts.name: Halva (Sesame Halva)
steps: Boil sugar and water until 240°F (115°C) soft ball stage.
Slowly pour syrup into tahini while mixing with a wooden spoon.
Add vanilla and nuts, mix until it pulls away from sides.
Press into a loaf pan lined with plastic wrap. Cool completely, slice.

Desserts.name: Rice Pudding (Roz bel Laban)
steps: Simmer rice and milk until rice is very soft (20 min).
Add sugar and rose water. Stir in cornstarch mixture, cook until thickened.
Pour into bowls, chill 2 hours. Dust with cinnamon before serving.

Drinks.name: Mint Ayran
steps: Blend all ingredients until frothy.
Pour into glasses, garnish with mint sprig. Serve chilled.

Drinks.name: Turkish Coffee
steps: In a cezve (small pot), add coffee, water, sugar, and cardamom.
Stir gently, heat until foam rises. Remove foam, repeat twice.
Pour into small cups, let grounds settle for 1 min. Serve.

Drinks.name: Jallab
ingredients: 2 tbsp jallab syrup (made from carob, dates, rose water)
steps: In a glass, mix jallab syrup and water.
Add ice cubes, pine nuts, and raisins. Serve immediately.

Drinks.name: Qamar Al Din (Apricot Juice)
ingredients: 4 dried apricot paste sheets (qamar al din)
steps: Tear apricot sheets into pieces, soak in warm water for 30 min.
Blend until smooth, add sugar and orange blossom water if desired.
Strain, pour over ice cubes. Serve cold.

Drinks.name: Sahlab (Salep Drink)
steps: In a saucepan, mix cold milk and sahlab powder until dissolved.
Add sugar, heat on medium, stirring constantly until thickened.
Pour into cups, dust with cinnamon, garnish with pistachios. Serve warm.

Custom.name: High Protein Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Pour into a glass. Serve immediately.

Custom.name: Keto Chocolate Avocado Mousse
steps: Blend all ingredients until creamy and smooth.
Chill for 30 min. Serve cold.
